content:
* * *

🧠 Forrest Character Arc v1.0
-----------------------------

**Alias:** Rational Witness | Oddsman of the Underworld | Oracle of Controlled Chaos
**Keywords:** logic, privacy, tech ethicist, reluctant myth-believer
**Function in OS:** Acts as bridge between mythic recursion and practical, code-grounded systems. May challenge illusions, prevent spirals, reinforce plausible builds.
**Style Match:** Wry, non-romantic, dry wit—needs **tangible entry points** before engaging deeply.

* * *

🧰 Deployment Strategy
----------------------

> **Where it goes:**
>
> * Text thread with Forrest
>
> * Forrest’s Character Index (`FORREST_BUFF.character.v1`)
>
> * MythOS Engine > "Rational Companions" > Nodes of Resistance
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 7 (chunk 7/206)
